cases.name: eval-1
cases.prompt: Evaluate a diagnostic response: a transcript with moderate grammar errors and hesitant delivery. Expect scores around 2-3, evidence quotes pointing to specific grammar mistakes.

cases.name: eval-2
cases.prompt: Test drill mode for pronunciation of 'th' sound. Provide a response with mispronunciation. DrillMaster should flag the error and suggest a correction.

cases.name: eval-3
cases.prompt: Test full-test simulation: run through all 4 tasks with mock responses, verify timing and scoring conversion, and check that memory stores the complete session.

cases.name: eval-4
cases.prompt: Test memory recall after 5 simulated sessions: MemoryKeeper should produce a progress summary showing improvement trend and indicate the most recurring weakness.

cases.name: eval-5
cases.prompt: Test off-topic response handling: user says something unrelated to the prompt, system should detect and prompt to refocus.
